snippet.title: Jiboner Hisab Mile Na | জীবনের হিসাব মিলে না | Baul Gaan | Bangla Folk Song | Bangla Sad song
snippet.description:
Welcome to Foridul Records. Dive into the deep, spiritual reflections of life with our new cover of "জীবনের হিসাব মিলে না" (Jiboner Hisab Mile Na).


Jiboner Hisab Mile Na | জীবনের হিসাব মিলে না | Baul Gaan | Bangla Folk Song | Bangla Sad song 


Life is a complex journey, and sometimes, no matter how hard we try, the calculations of our struggles and sacrifices simply do not add up. Originally sung and written by the talented Asraf Babu, this profound Baul folk song speaks to the raw, unfiltered reality of human existence and the spiritual weight we carry. Through this heartfelt cover, Foridul Islam brings his signature soulful vocals and deep emotional resonance to this philosophical koster gaan.

We hope this cinematic and musical journey brings peace to your restless mind. If this song touches your soul, please hit the LIKE button, share your own life's reflections in the COMMENTS, and SUBSCRIBE to our channel for more authentic Bengali folk music. Press the bell icon 🔔 so you never miss a new release!

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🎵 Cover Credits:
🔹 Song: Jiboner Hisab Mile Na (জীবনের হিসাব মিলে না)
🔹 Singer: Foridul Islam
🔹 Music: Foridul Islam
🔹 Label: Foridul Records
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🎵 Original Song Credits:
🔹 Singer: Asraf Babu
🔹 Lyrics & Tune: Asraf Babu
🔹 Music: Always Music
🔹 Label: Nupur Music
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🎶 Message of the Song:
When the illusions of the world fade, we are left to face the ultimate truth of our souls. This track is a dedication to those walking the difficult, lonely paths of life, searching for meaning when the numbers just won't align.


⚠️ Copyright Disclaimer: All rights belong to the original creators and respective copyright holders. This cover is produced with the utmost respect for the original artists, for entertainment and artistic expression. No copyright infringement intended.

Best Regards,
Foridul Islam

snippet.description:
A journey back home is never just about a place. Sometimes it is about memories, people, dreams, and the version of ourselves we left behind. “Ghore Fera Hobe” by Odd Signature is a wholesome Bangla pop rock song filled with emotion, nostalgia, hope, and the feeling of finding your way again. Presented on Antik Mahmud’s YouTube channel, this original Bengali music video blends heartfelt storytelling, cinematic visuals, and modern Bangladeshi pop rock vibes. snippet.title: নকআউট স্টেজ উইক ৪ ডে ১ | FFWS Bangladesh Spring 2026 | Garena Free Fire
snippet.description:
শুরু হয়ে গেছে FFWS Bangladesh Spring 2026-এর নকআউট স্টেজের লড়াই।
৩৬টি টপ টিম থেকে টিকে আছে মাত্র ১৮টি টিম, আর সেখান থেকে শুধুমাত্র ১২টি টিম জায়গা করে নেবে স্বপ্নের Grand Final-এ।

৬০,০০,০০০ টাকার প্রাইজ পুল এবং Esports World Cup 2026-এ বাংলাদেশকে প্রতিনিধিত্ব করার সুযোগের জন্য চলছে হাড্ডাহাড্ডি ব্যাটেল।
টপ ২টি টিম সরাসরি অংশগ্রহণ করবে Esports World Cup 2026-এ।

এখনই লাইভে যুক্ত হয়ে সাপোর্ট করুন আপনার পছন্দের টিমকে।

snippet.title: Diwana Hai Ye Man (From "Chori Chori Chupke Chupke") Salman Khan, Rani, Preity |Sonu Nigam & Alka Y
snippet.description:
"Diwana Hai Ye Man" ke jaadu mein kho jaaiye, jo 2001 ki blockbuster film "Chori Chori Chupke Chupke" ka ek behtareen romantic track hai. Sonu Nigam aur Alka Yagnik ki awaaz mein ye gaana aaj bhi dilon ko chhu leta hai. Salman Khan, Rani Mukherjee aur Preity Zinta ki chemistry aur Anu Malik ka sangeet ise ek evergreen hit banata hai.

Is nostalgic melody ko enjoy karein aur apne doston ke saath share karein!

Credits:

Singer(s): Sonu Nigam & Alka Yagnik
Music Director: Anu Malik
Lyricist: Sameer
Cast: Salman Khan, Rani Mukherjee, Preity Zinta
Director: Abbas-Mustan

क्यूँ पागल है धड़कन
क्यूँ तुझपे मुझे प्यार आया है
यह मौसम क्यूँ सजे
यह पायल क्यूँ बजे
यह कैसा खुमार छ्चाया है
कोई बता दे, कोई बता दे, कोई बताए ना

snippet.title: ONAYASHEY-Runa Laila & Bappa Mazumder- Bangla Ghazal- রুনা লায়লা, বাপ্পা মজুমদার- 2026
snippet.description:
Presenting “Onayashey” — a soulful Bangla Ghazal that brings together two extraordinary voices of our time, legendary singer Runa Laila and melody king Bappa Mazumder.
Written by the talented Galib Hasan, this timeless composition blends deep emotions, poetic expression, and a modern ghazal soundscape. The song marks a special musical collaboration between generations, creating a unique experience for lovers of Bangla music and ghazal alike.

With heartfelt lyrics, soulful melodies, and mesmerizing performances, “Onayashey” is a journey through love, longing, and emotion.

Song: Onayashey
Singers: Runa Laila & Bappa Mazumder
Poetry: Galib Hasan
Composition & Music Direction: Bappa Mazumder
Album: Onubhob

snippet.title: Rohel Khan - Hore Zaibi Shundori (From “Rewritten Memory” EP) | Official Music Video
snippet.description:
“Hore Zaibi Shundori” is a recreated version of a classic old song, originally written and composed by Shobu. From the debut EP Rewritten Memory by Rohel Khan, the track revives the timeless melody with a fresh modern vibe while preserving the emotion of the original song.

This official music video blends emotional storytelling, cinematic visuals, and a nostalgic atmosphere to bring the song to a new generation.

Credits:
🎤 Artist, Music Production, Mix & Master, Edit & Color: Rohel Khan
✍️ Lyrics & Composed by: Shobu
🎥 Videography / Cinematography: Ashraf Mehraj
